waf_rules.name: Block SQL Injection Attempts
waf_rules.description: Blocks common SQL injection patterns in query strings
waf_rules.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "UNION SELECT") or (http.request.uri.query contains "'; DROP") or (http.request.uri.query contains "--") or (http.request.body contains "UNION SELECT")

waf_rules.name: Rate Limit API Endpoints
waf_rules.description: 100 requests per minute per IP for API endpoints

waf_rules.name: Block Known Bad User Agents
waf_rules.description: Block common scraping and attack tools
